name: Seafood Thermidor
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh or frozen fish fillets
1/2 lb Crabmeat, clams, shrimp and/or scallops (any combinations)
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw fish if frozen and cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place all seafood in a pan or skillet.
3. Add lemon slice, quartered onion, and water just to cover.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 4 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, blend soup with flour.
6. Gradually stir in milk, lemon juice, and wine. Cook while stirring constantly until thick.
7. Stir in mustard, shredded Mozzarella cheese, and parsley.
8. Carefully drain seafood well and gently fold into the sauce.
9. Spoon the mixture into a lightly-greased medium-size casserole or individual casserole dishes.
10. Combine bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, butter, and paprika. Sprinkle over casseroles.
11. Broil for 1 to 2 minutes.
12. Serve over your choice of rice or pastry shells. Serves 4.
